economic_notes: Band has extensive business enterprises including Duz Cho Logging, Duz Cho Construction, Duz Cho Group of Companies, Three Feathers LP, McLeod Lake Mackenzie Community Forest LP, Tse'khene Development LP, and new investments in Shas Ti-Dlezeh Industrial Park LP, Shas Ti-Dlezeh Extraction Plant LP, and MIXT Energy Exports LP. Sale of logs from settlement lands is a major revenue stream.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Prior year figures restated due to correction of error (Note 24) reducing opening accumulated surplus by $2,600,000. Large surplus driven by earnings from Band business entities ($11.37M) and sale of logs ($11.48M) and Province of BC transfers ($11.03M). Debt forgiveness of $827,877 between Band-owned entities. Band consolidates 5 entities (Social Housing Fund, Tse'khene Community Development Corporation, Tse'khene Food and Fuel Ltd., Duz Cho Forest Products LP, Duz Cho Forest Products Ltd.) and uses modified equity for 12 GBEs. New investments in Shas Ti-Dlezeh Industrial Park LP, Shas Ti-Dlezeh Extraction Plant LP and MIXT Energy Exports LP totalling $1,750,000 at cost. Tangible capital assets net book value not extracted from text as Schedule 1 detail was not provided. Deferred revenue balance not fully extracted as note was cut off. Auditor office located in Prince George, BC - firm name inferred as BDO Canada LLP based on address 800-299 Victoria Street Prince George BC.
